{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "00234bdf",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# ARIMA with Seasonal Differencing Using Alternative Estimators\n",
    "\n",
    "The `ARIMA` class supports several parameter estimation methods beyond the\n",
    "default `statespace` approach: `hannan_rissanen`, `yule_walker`, `burg`, and\n",
    "`innovations`. These methods are faster and do not require numerical\n",
    "optimisation, making them useful for quick estimation or as starting-value\n",
    "generators.\n",
    "\n",
    "Previously, all four methods rejected any model with a non-zero seasonal\n",
    "period — even models whose only seasonal component is differencing (i.e.\n",
    "`seasonal_order=(0, D, 0, s)` with `D > 0`). This notebook demonstrates that\n",
    "they now correctly handle seasonal differencing while still raising a clear\n",
    "error for seasonal AR or MA terms."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "de47bb93",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:46.332219Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-23T10:24:46.332024Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:47.879230Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:47.877493Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "%matplotlib inline"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "c7b25084",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:47.881822Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-23T10:24:47.881479Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.022828Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.020132Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import statsmodels.api as sm\n",
    "from statsmodels.tsa.arima.model import ARIMA\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.rc(\"figure\", figsize=(14, 5))\n",
    "plt.rc(\"font\", size=12)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f46aa299",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Data: Mauna Loa Atmospheric CO₂\n",
    "\n",
    "We use the classic Keeling Curve dataset, which records monthly mean\n",
    "atmospheric CO₂ concentrations (in parts per million by volume) measured at\n",
    "the Mauna Loa Observatory, Hawaii. The series exhibits two clear features:\n",
    "\n",
    "- A long-run upward trend driven by fossil-fuel emissions.\n",
    "- A strong annual seasonal cycle caused by Northern Hemisphere plant growth\n",
    "  (CO₂ is drawn down each summer and rises each winter).\n",
    "\n",
    "These features make the CO₂ series a natural candidate for a model with both\n",
    "regular and seasonal differencing."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "270fff94",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.028131Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.027568Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.165616Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.159658Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "::\n",
      "\n",
      "    Number of observations: 2225\n",
      "    Number of variables: 2\n",
      "    Variable name definitions:\n",
      "\n",
      "        date - sample date in YYMMDD format\n",
      "        co2 - CO2 Concentration ppmv\n",
      "\n",
      "    The data returned by load_pandas contains the dates as the index.\n",
      "\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "co2 = sm.datasets.co2.load_pandas().data\n",
    "co2 = co2.resample(\"ME\").mean().ffill()   # resample to month-end, fill one gap\n",
    "print(sm.datasets.co2.NOTE)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "4003b959",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.171174Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.170948Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.975136Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.974215Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1400x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots()\n",
    "co2.plot(ax=ax, color=\"steelblue\")\n",
    "ax.set_title(\"Mauna Loa CO₂ Concentration (monthly)\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(\"CO₂ (ppmv)\")\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"\")\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "349dbaf1",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Choosing a Model\n",
    "\n",
    "A single seasonal difference (D=1, s=12) removes the annual seasonal pattern,\n",
    "and a single regular difference (d=1) removes the linear trend. After both\n",
    "differences the series is approximately stationary, so low-order AR and MA\n",
    "terms are sufficient.\n",
    "\n",
    "We use `ARIMA(1, 1, 1)(0, 1, 0, 12)` as the main specification. For\n",
    "estimators that only support pure-AR models (`yule_walker`, `burg`) we use\n",
    "`ARIMA(2, 0, 0)(0, 1, 0, 12)` instead."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "5b5f5fbb",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.981068Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-23T10:24:52.980832Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:53.740147Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:53.739107Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1400x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "co2_diff = co2.diff().diff(12).dropna()\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots()\n",
    "co2_diff.plot(ax=ax, color=\"steelblue\")\n",
    "ax.set_title(\"CO₂ after regular + seasonal differencing (Δ¹Δ¹²)\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(\"CO₂ (ppmv)\")\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"\")\n",
    "ax.axhline(0, color=\"black\", linewidth=0.8, linestyle=\"--\")\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "8c60e102",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Fitting with Alternative Estimators\n",
    "\n",
    "### Hannan-Rissanen\n",
    "\n",
    "`hannan_rissanen` fits ARMA models via a three-step least-squares procedure.\n",
    "It is fast and closed-form. We pass `seasonal_order=(0, 1, 0, 12)` so the\n",
    "series is seasonally differenced before estimation."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "662802bf",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:53.748836Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-23T10:24:53.748607Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:54.015196Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:54.014581Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "ar.L1     0.1481\n",
      "ma.L1    -0.4870\n",
      "sigma2    0.1796\n",
      "dtype: float64\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "res_hr = ARIMA(co2, order=(1, 1, 1), seasonal_order=(0, 1, 0, 12)).fit(\n",
    "    method=\"hannan_rissanen\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "print(res_hr.params.round(4))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1591024e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Yule-Walker\n",
    "\n",
    "`yule_walker` is limited to pure-AR models but supports seasonal differencing\n",
    "in the same way."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "80f125da",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:54.019802Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-23T10:24:54.019580Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:54.226587Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:54.223984Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "ar.L1     0.6965\n",
      "ar.L2     0.2691\n",
      "sigma2    0.1831\n",
      "dtype: float64\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "res_yw = ARIMA(co2, order=(2, 0, 0), seasonal_order=(0, 1, 0, 12)).fit(\n",
    "    method=\"yule_walker\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "print(res_yw.params.round(4))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "82cbba55",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Statespace (reference)\n",
    "\n",
    "We also fit the same ARIMA(1,1,1)(0,1,0,12) specification with the default\n",
    "`statespace` method. This produces full MLE estimates with standard errors,\n",
    "serving as a numerical reference for the alternative estimators."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "11ca07eb",
   "metadata": {

     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:54.229441Z",

     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:55.428779Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:55.428091Z"
    }
   },

   "source": [
    "res_ss = ARIMA(co2, order=(1, 1, 1), seasonal_order=(0, 1, 0, 12)).fit(\n",
    "    method=\"statespace\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "res_ss.summary()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3a6bfa35",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Comparing Parameter Estimates\n",
    "\n",
    "The alternative estimators are consistent but not efficient — they trade some\n",
    "accuracy for speed. The table below compares the AR and MA coefficients\n",
    "from Hannan-Rissanen against the statespace MLE reference."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "218f62f2",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:55.433305Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-23T10:24:55.433062Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:55.455069Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:55.454316Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "       hannan_rissanen  statespace (MLE)\n",
      "ar.L1           0.1481            0.2684\n",
      "ma.L1          -0.4870           -0.6171\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "comparison = pd.DataFrame({\n",
    "    \"hannan_rissanen\": res_hr.params.drop(\"sigma2\").round(4),\n",
    "    \"statespace (MLE)\": res_ss.params.drop(\"sigma2\").round(4),\n",
    "})\n",
    "print(comparison.to_string())"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "797a6f52",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Residual Diagnostics\n",
    "\n",
    "A quick look at the Hannan-Rissanen residuals confirms there is no remaining\n",
    "structure in the series."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "id": "556dafbe",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:55.463503Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-23T10:24:55.463216Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:58.470101Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:58.468505Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1400x800 with 4 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig = res_hr.plot_diagnostics(figsize=(14, 8))\n",
    "fig.suptitle(\"Hannan-Rissanen residual diagnostics\", y=1.01)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "812aecaf",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## What Is Still Not Supported\n",
    "\n",
    "Seasonal AR and MA terms (`P > 0` or `Q > 0`) require the full statespace\n",
    "machinery. The alternative estimators will raise a `ValueError` with a clear\n",
    "message:"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 11,
   "id": "d4bf08b2",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-23T10:24:58.472300Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-23T10:24:58.472076Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-23T10:24:58.493585Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-23T10:24:58.490466Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "ValueError : Hannan-Rissanen estimator does not support seasonal AR or MA components.\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "try:\n",
    "    ARIMA(co2, order=(1, 0, 0), seasonal_order=(1, 0, 0, 12)).fit(\n",
    "        method=\"hannan_rissanen\"\n",
    "    )\n",
    "except ValueError as e:\n",
    "    print(type(e).__name__, \":\", e)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "207a6afb",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Summary\n",
    "\n",
    "| Estimator | Seasonal diff (D>0) | Seasonal AR/MA (P,Q>0) |\n",
    "|---|---|---|\n",
    "| `hannan_rissanen` | ✓ supported | ✗ raises ValueError |\n",
    "| `yule_walker` | ✓ supported | ✗ raises ValueError |\n",
    "| `burg` | ✓ supported | ✗ raises ValueError |\n",
    "| `innovations` | ✓ supported | ✗ raises ValueError |\n",
    "| `innovations_mle` | ✓ supported | ✓ supported |\n",
    "| `statespace` | ✓ supported | ✓ supported |\n",
    "\n",
    "For full SARIMA models with seasonal AR or MA components, use\n",
    "`method=\"statespace\"` or `method=\"innovations_mle\"`."
   ]
  }
